# Specialized procedure

## Purpose
State the exact recurring procedure this skill exists to perform.

## Workflow
1. Clarify the task.
2. Load only the relevant references.
3. Produce the smallest correct deliverable.
4. Verify or propose verification.

## Boundaries
- state what the skill should not attempt
- state when another mechanism is better than this skill
